results.title: Farmers plea to government 'What is ag policy?' almost two years after election
results.description: Nearly two years after the election, and with the country about to see its seventh Prime Minister in 10 years, many farmers are still asking a simple question: what is the government's agricultural policy?

results.title: Le FME: quand l’émergence vole la vedette
results.description: À l’aube de ses 25 ans, le Festival de musique émergente (FME) en Abitibi-Témiscamingue ne ressent pas le poids des années, bien au contraire

results.title: Pune Fort murder – Cricket match, then Diwali party: How Siya Goyal met Chetan Chaudhray
results.description: Siya’s brother said that he knew Chetan Chaudhary, unlike her parents who denied having any knowledge about the man. He said that he first met Chetan during a cricket match, where Siya too accompanied him. He said that Siya and Chetan later agains met at a Diwali Party.

results.title: Attack on vessel transiting strait sees US retaliate
results.description: WASHINGTON -- The U.S. struck Iran on Friday in response to a drone attack a day earlier on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz. It's the most significant test yet to an interim understanding reached a week ago by the two countries to begin working to end their monthslong war and reopen the pivotal waterway.

results.title: Frank Lampard Coventry City chat revealed as ex-Chelsea star warns of 'fine line' transfer risk

results.title: Marcelo Bielsa’s World Cup Nightmare Ends in Humiliation as Uruguay Crash Out and His Legacy Crumbles
results.description: Marcelo Bielsa’s three-year spell in charge of Uruguay has come to a disappointing conclusion after the South American giants crashed out of the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the group stage. The 1-0 defeat to Spain in Guadalajara sealed Uruguay’s elimination and marked a second consecutive World Cup campaign ending before the knockout rounds. It [...]

results.title: Ministry of Labour opens 2026 National Conference in Ho
results.description: The Ministry of Labour, Jobs and Employment has officially opened its 2026 Annual National Labour Conference in Ho, the Volta Regional capital. The three-day conference is under the theme “Strengthening Industrial Harmony as a Catalyst for Accelerated Economic Growth and National Development”. It has brought together government officials, employers, organised labour, industry leaders, and labour [...]

results.title: California’s ‘first partner’ targeted by Trump, Gov. Gavin Newsom says. Here is what we know about her career, finances
results.description: WASHINGTON — Jennifer Siebel Newsom has spent more than a decade cultivating an identity distinct from her husband, Gov. Gavin Newsom, as an active documentary filmmaker and gender equity activist with her own organizations, staff and salary.

results.title: Army appoints new general officers commanding, principal staff officers in major reshuffle
results.description: The Chief of Army Staff (COAS), Lieutenant General Waidi Shaibu, has approved the appointment of new General Officers Commanding for 6 Division, Port Harcourt and 3 Division, Jos, as well as a new Commander for Army Headquarters Garrison. results.title: Kohberger murder case cost taxpayers millions. Defense expenses remain unclear
results.description: BOISE, Idaho — Mounting a legal defense for Bryan Kohberger on the public dime has cost nearly $5.5 million — and counting — according to an analysis by the Idaho Statesman.

results.title: Editorial: Beware the hidden risks lurking in property tax cuts
results.description: A home that gains value is part of the American dream — except for the taxes. In the past two years, 17 states have lowered or limited property taxes as politicians respond to escalating prices.
